title: Hotdog Client
description: A simple and easy to use Client Modpack with some special features
body:
# Features ⚙️ 

**The Hotdog Client modpack is designed to enhance your Minecraft experience with a range of powerful tools and optimizations.** It features an autoclicker with customizable CPS (clicks per second), a freecam mode for better exploration, and various multiplayer improvements to give you a competitive edge. The modpack also includes a fullbright option for better visibility in dark environments, performance enhancements for smoother gameplay, and customizable bridging styles to suit your playstyle. With countless hours spent refining each feature, the Hotdog Client delivers unmatched functionality and flexibility, ensuring you have the best possible tools at your disposal for any situation.

# Technical details ❓ 

**The Hotdog Client Runs entirely on the client side,** it can be used seamlessly on any server or world, providing you with an array of features.

![Player building a house using Hotdog client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bba3a9d791b3130360575e37bfcc99264f31c1fb.png)
